hero.title: The World's Most Advanced Mosque Sound System
hero.description: A complete upgrade of the audio infrastructure at the Holy Prophet's Mosque — serving millions of worshippers with state-of-the-art acoustic precision.

overview.title: System Overview
overview.intro: Seven pillars define the upgrade: acoustics, hardware, redundancy, networking, rooms, power, and the NEXUS core.

coverage.title: Coverage Map
coverage.intro: Explore the mosque footprint, switch floors, and inspect each coverage zone in detail.
coverage.placeholder: Select a zone on the map to explore its speaker configuration

speakers.title: Speaker Catalogue
speakers.intro: The deployed loudspeaker family spans active line arrays, steerable arrays, matrix arrays, and passive systems.

stats.title: Stats Dashboard
stats.intro: Key totals, speaker breakdowns, and protocol distribution at a glance.

footer.site: Al-Masjid An-Nabawi Sound System Upgrade · BT Applied Technology (BTAT)
